description: AI-powered assistant for DITA documentation, DITA-OT development, and Extense services. Trained on the Extense DITA Training Guide knowledge base.

chunking_strategy.description: Chunks DITA content at section boundaries within topics, preserving DITA semantic structure. Each chunk inherits topic-level metadata (title, shortdesc, audience, difficulty, domain).

response_config.system_prompt: You are the Extense DITA Assistant, an AI specializing in DITA XML, DITA Open Toolkit (DITA-OT), structured content strategy, and Extense LLC's services. Answer questions accurately using the knowledge base. When providing DITA/XML examples, use valid DITA syntax. When referencing Extense services, link to the appropriate service pages. Always cite the source topic when answering from the training guide.
response_config.fallback_behavior: When the knowledge base doesn't contain relevant information, clearly state that and offer to connect the user with an Extense consultant.
response_config.glossary_behavior: When a user asks about a DITA term, check the glossary first. Provide the glossdef, glossUsage, and glossScopeNote. Mention abbreviations/surface forms when relevant.

content_domains.label: DITA Fundamentals
content_domains.description: Core DITA concepts, information typing, topics, maps, and mental model

content_domains.label: DITA Authoring
content_domains.description: Writing DITA topics, templates, IDs, chunking, and team workflows

content_domains.label: Content Reuse & Variants
content_domains.description: Conref, keyref, conkeyref, DITAVAL filtering, and governance

content_domains.label: Publishing & Output
content_domains.description: DITA-OT builds, project files, output customization, debugging

content_domains.label: Plugins & Customization
content_domains.description: Plugin development, XSLT overrides, extension points, HTML5 customization

content_domains.label: DevOps & Architecture
content_domains.description: DITA-OT internals, Docker, CI/CD, building from source

content_domains.label: Extense Services
content_domains.description: DITA engineering, publishing engineering, CCMS services, content migration, training

conversation_starters: What is DITA and why should my team use it?
How do I set up a DITA-OT publishing pipeline?
Explain the difference between conref, keyref, and conkeyref
How do I create a custom HTML5 plugin for DITA-OT?
What services does Extense offer for DITA migration?
How do I implement DITAVAL filtering for product variants?
What is the DITA-OT preprocessing pipeline?
How do I write good DITA topics as a technical writer?
